# Full-Stack Application Workspace

This workspace contains a Spring Boot backend (Java 17) and Angular frontend.

## Project Structure
- `backend/` - Spring Boot REST API (Java 17)
- `frontend/` - Angular application

## Backend (Spring Boot)
- Uses Maven for dependency management
- Java 17
- Spring Boot 3.x with Spring Web, Spring Data JPA
- RESTful API architecture

## Frontend (Angular)
- Uses npm for package management
- Angular CLI for development
- Component-based architecture with services and routing

## Development Instructions
- Backend runs on port 8085
- Frontend runs on port 4200
- Configure CORS in backend for frontend communication
